parameters.query: SELECT ac.id, ac.nom, ac.code, ac.complexity, ac.setup_price, ac.monthly_price, t.nom_entreprise AS client_name, t.id AS tid FROM automation_catalog ac, tenants t WHERE ac.id = '{{ $json.automationId }}'::uuid AND ac.is_active = true AND t.id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid

INSERT INTO automation_purchases (tenant_id, automation_id, status, setup_price_paid, monthly_price, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.automationId }}'::uuid, 'en_attente', {{ $json.setupPrice }}, {{ $json.monthlyPrice }}, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, automation_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'en_attente', updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id

INSERT INTO notifications (tenant_id, type, titre, message, donnees, lu, created_at) SELECT t.id, 'automation_request', 'Demande d''activation', '{{ $('04. Preparer').first().json.clientName }} demande l''activation de {{ $('04. Preparer').first().json.automationNom }}', '{"automationId": "{{ $('04. Preparer').first().json.automationId }}", "clientName": "{{ $('04. Preparer').first().json.clientName }}", "complexity": "{{ $('04. Preparer').first().json.complexity }}"}'::jsonb, false, NOW() FROM tenants t JOIN users u ON u.tenant_id = t.id WHERE u.role = 'super_admin' LIMIT 1
SELECT u.email FROM users u WHERE u.role = 'super_admin' LIMIT 1

parameters.subject: =Nouvelle demande : {{ $('04. Preparer').first().json.clientName }} - {{ $('04. Preparer').first().json.automationNom }}
